question:
Jompuses are not blue. Each rompus is happy. Rompuses are dumpuses. Dumpuses are not cold. Each dumpus is a wumpus. Each wumpus is liquid. Each wumpus is an impus. Each impus is kind. Every impus is a yumpus. Each yumpus is bright. Yumpuses are zumpuses. Each zumpus is sour. Each zumpus is a vumpus. Every vumpus is small. Vumpuses are tumpuses. Every tumpus is blue. Every tumpus is a numpus. Fae is an impus.

Is the following statement true or false? Fae is not blue.
